lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Arr, Matey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in search of treasure.

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Arr, treasure you be after eh? Well I might be able to tell you where to find some... For a price...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of price?

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Well for example if you can get me a bottle of rum... Not just any rum mind...

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: I'd like some rum made on Karamja Island. There's no rum like Karamja Rum!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would some Braindeath 'Rum' do?

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Gadzooks, that swill! Not a chance!

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: It's Karamja Rum or no deal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I will bring you some rum.

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Yer a saint, although it'll take a miracle to get it off Karamja.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: The Customs office has been clampin' down on the export of spirits. You seem like a resourceful young [lad/lass], I'm sure ye'll be able to find a way to slip the stuff past them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'll give it a shot.

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Arr, that's the spirit!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Fair enough. I'll still be here and thirsty whenever you feel like helpin' out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Arr!

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Arr!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have anything for trade?

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Nothin' at the moment, but then again the Customs Agents are on the warpath right now.

sections.title: Using a Karamjan rum on him after Pirate's Treasure is completed

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Thanks fer the thought, but I still have to finish this bottle.

lines.speaker: Redbeard Frank
lines.text: Arr, Matey!
